topics.title: Form 11 / Pay and File
topics.summary: Self-assessed individuals file Form 11 and pay preliminary tax by 31 October (mid-Nov for ROS filers). Late-filing surcharge 5% (10% after 2 months).

topics.title: PAYE Modernisation
topics.summary: Employers report pay & deductions to Revenue on or before each payday via ROS. Standard rate cut-off €44,000 (single, 2025).

topics.title: USC — Universal Social Charge
topics.summary: 2025 bands: 0.5% to €12,012; 2% to €27,382; 3% to €70,044; 8% above. Self-employed >€100k extra 3%.

topics.title: VAT
topics.summary: Standard 23%, reduced 13.5% / 9%, zero rating for certain supplies. Registration threshold €85,000 (goods) or €42,500 (services).

topics.title: Corporation Tax
topics.summary: 12.5% trading income; 25% non-trading/passive. Top-Up Tax for MNEs under Pillar Two effective for periods starting on or after 31 Dec 2023.
